title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.140 - Costs, how adjudged
text:
236.140.  Costs, how adjudged. — The costs attending the trial of such issues shall be adjudged against the unsuccessful party, as in other civil cases.
(RSMo 1939 § 10299) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9170; 1919 § 7412; 1909 § 5469
